CVE-2024-55566.title: ColPack 1.0.10 through 9a7293a has a predictable temporary file ( ...
CVE-2024-55566.description: ColPack 1.0.10 through 9a7293a has a predictable temporary file (located under /tmp with a name derived from an unseeded RNG). The impact can be overwriting files or making ColPack graphing unavailable to other users.
